aries.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Aries today.
aries.deploy_today: Maybe — the stars are silent, which is better than them screaming no.
aries.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet today. Your CI pipeline is not. It never is.

taurus.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Taurus today.
taurus.deploy_today: No — a good Taurus knows when to wait. The queue will still be there tomorrow.
taurus.prophecy: The universe asks you to stand firm today. Your tech debt has been standing firm for three sprints. It is also very firm.

gemini.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Gemini today.
gemini.deploy_today: Maybe — you'll start the deploy and immediately open six other tabs.
gemini.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet for Gemini today. You will open 14 browser tabs to compensate. Twelve are Stack Overflow.

cancer.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Cancer today.
cancer.deploy_today: No — you have feelings about this deploy. The feelings are correct.
cancer.prophecy: The stars are quiet for Cancer today. Your standup update will not be. You have a lot to share.

leo.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Leo today.
leo.deploy_today: Yes — Leo deploys and Leo takes credit. That is simply the natural order.
leo.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet for Leo today. Leo will make noise on behalf of the cosmos. Leo always does.

virgo.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Virgo today.
virgo.deploy_today: Yes — your pre-deploy checklist has 47 items. You checked them all. Twice.
virgo.prophecy: The stars are silent. You have documented the silence in Confluence. There are three diagrams and a risk matrix.

libra.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Libra today.
libra.deploy_today: Maybe — you will spend 45 minutes deciding and then the deploy window closes.
libra.prophecy: The cosmos want balance today. Your PR has 3 approvals and 3 change requests. The universe is satisfied. You are not.

scorpio.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Scorpio today.
scorpio.deploy_today: No — something is watching. The logs are watching. They are always watching.
scorpio.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet for Scorpio today. That is exactly what they want you to think.

sagittarius.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Sagittarius today.
sagittarius.deploy_today: Yes — Sagittarius does not ask for permission. Sagittarius pushes to main. Sagittarius has always pushed to main.
sagittarius.prophecy: The stars are silent but Sagittarius is already halfway through a rewrite nobody requested and nobody approved.

capricorn.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Capricorn today.
capricorn.deploy_today: Yes — Capricorn deploys because Capricorn always deploys. Rest is a Q3 initiative.
capricorn.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet. You schedule a meeting to discuss the silence. It runs 90 minutes and ends with action items.

aquarius.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Aquarius today.
aquarius.deploy_today: No — Aquarius has a better idea. Aquarius always has a better idea. The better idea is not ready yet.
aquarius.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet for Aquarius. Aquarius decides to refactor the cosmos. In Rust.

pisces.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Pisces today.
pisces.deploy_today: No — Pisces is somewhere else entirely. In their mind, everything is already fixed.
pisces.prophecy: The stars are quiet and Pisces is at peace. Their PR has been open for two weeks. Pisces is still at peace.
